post.description:
Check whether a customer coordinate is within the restaurant's delivery radius.
Returns { withinRadius, distanceKm }.

get.description: Public order tracking — match by order ID + guest_phone or user phone.

Permanently delete a restaurant tenant and ALL related data.
orders and points lack ON DELETE CASCADE so must be removed manually first.

get.description: Public site settings for the current tenant (resolved from hostname).

Return the theme settings for the current tenant.
Tenant is resolved from the HTTP Host header (hostname → domains table).
